page_0173_1.png: Graphic Editor with selected red circle object showing blue resize handles and green bounding box, with Graphics Object Palette panel displaying reusable HMI symbol library items

page_0175_0.png: Tools palette showing 24 tools in 4 rows including selection arrow, line/polyline, rectangle, ellipse, filled shapes, arc, image import, static text, checkbox, radio button, slider, push button, trend chart, gauge, and tag linker tools

page_0176.png: Edit Animations dialog with empty Animations pane showing prompt to add animations, with popup menu displaying all available animation types: Visibility, Fill Style, Line Style, Text Style, Blink, Element Style, Alarm Border, Value Display, Pushbutton, Show Symbol, and others
